objective: Plan a non-authoritative P0 readiness manifest and verifier that consumes verified M3-M5 exits, preserves the direct path, and exercises one controlled owner boundary.
falsifiable_claim: P0 readiness cannot be emitted unless selected M3, M4, and M5 literal exits, a passing direct-path regression, and one controlled owner-boundary fixture are content-bound into one manifest.
exit_criteria: Checker consumes verified literal M3, M4, and M5 exits and proves the simple direct-path regression.
One controlled owner-boundary fixture emits a hash-bound P0 manifest without granting authority.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M5_P0_READINESS_VERIFIER_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Substitute, omit, stale, or duplicate any stage exit, direct-path result, owner-boundary fixture, manifest root, evidence index, or success literal.
remaining_nonclaims: P0 is a walking skeleton only: no production, claim-bearing cohort, multi-node, federation, or matched-performance claim.
Claim-bearing qualification remains M9-gated and this proposal closes no stage.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
